//: LibreLane hardening config for the spdif_to_i2s core, as a macro for a
mixed-signal IC. LibreLane reads SystemVerilog directly (no sv2v).
clock: 10 ns = 100 MHz (extends supported Fs to 96 kHz)
floorplan: absolute die; resize to fit the parent chip / synth area
timing repair (raise the margins if hold fails)
macro integration: reserve met5 for the parent PDN/routing, and
export a clean abstract LEF (pin area only, no net labels) for LVS.
signoff time-savers -- turn ON for a real mixed-signal signoff
